text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
123 
SEX_CD 
LABEL: 
Sex (Biological) — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the (biological) sex code for the beneficiary. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
MBSF/T-MSIS DE file (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = Unknown 
1 = Male 
2 = Female 
COMMENT: 
This variable is populated with the MBSF SEX_IDENT_CD variable. If beneficiary is enrolled only in 
Medicaid, then we populate the variable with T-MSIS DE variable SEX_CD. 
^
